title: Toast
description: Ephemeral notification rendered by ToastContainer. Not instantiated directly: fired via the info / success / warning / danger helpers of the useToast() composable.

playground.title: Notification
playground.description: Preview with the current playground settings.

colors.title: Semantic colors
colors.desc: Four helpers cover the common states: informational, success, warning and error.

action.title: With action
action.desc: action adds an inline button — the classic 'Undo' pattern after a deletion.
action.toastDesc: We sent it to the trash.

icon.title: Custom icon
icon.desc: Pass any icon component (heroicons or other) to replace the default icon.

pinned.title: Pinned (no auto-close)
pinned.desc: duration: 0 keeps the toast until the user dismisses it or you call dismiss().

props.title: Main title of the toast.
props.icon: Custom leading icon. Defaults to one chosen by color.
props.duration: Auto-close in ms. Use 0 to keep the toast pinned.
props.pauseOnHover: Pauses the timer while the cursor is over the toast.
props.id: Stable ID. If reused, the toast updates in-place.
props.radius: Radius override; cascades from provider by default.
props.placement: Position override for this specific toast.
